failures.description: The run failed because the catalog search dependency timed out, preventing the agent from obtaining the product evidence needed to answer.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal matched the user request: search available Vacuum Cleaners with bagged/bagless=bagged and price greater than 591.59. At index 2, the Researcher output text says bagless, but the structured tool args shown there and the actual tool invocation at index 3 use bagged, so that inconsistency did not become the operative unresolved failure. At index 3, the ProductCatalogSearch call was well-formed and used the needed arguments, but the tool returned an explicit infrastructure error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, dependency timed out after 30000ms. The later steps did not resolve this because the Executor reported the task could not be completed and the Evaluator rejected the answer due to unavailable tool evidence.
